title: Budget overview and the three kartavyas
summary: Speech opener, macro framing, and the three-kartavya structure (growth, aspirations, inclusion) that organises the rest of Part A.

title: Scaling up manufacturing in 7 strategic sectors
summary: Biopharma SHAKTI, ISM 2.0, Electronics Components, Rare Earth Corridors, Chemical Parks, and Capital Goods schemes with specific outlays.

title: Textile, sports goods, and village industries
summary: Integrated Textile Programme with five sub-parts, Mega Textile Parks, Mahatma Gandhi Gram Swaraj, and a sports goods manufacturing initiative.

title: Legacy industrial clusters and Champion MSMEs
summary: Revival of 200 legacy industrial clusters and a three-pronged Champion MSMEs approach: equity (SME Growth Fund), liquidity (TReDS), and professional support.

title: Infrastructure, energy, and city economic regions
summary: Public capex trajectory, Infrastructure Risk Guarantee Fund, REITs, freight corridors, seaplanes, ₹20,000 crore CCUS outlay, City Economic Regions framework, and seven High-Speed Rail corridors.

title: Financial sector, capital markets, and AI
summary: High Level Committee on Banking, NBFC restructuring, FEMA review, corporate and municipal bond reforms, PROI investment limits, ease of doing business, and emerging technologies.

title: Education-to-employment, health, and AYUSH
summary: High-Powered E3 Standing Committee, Allied Health Professionals expansion, Care Ecosystem, medical value tourism hubs, and three new All India Institutes of Ayurveda.

title: Livestock, orange economy, design, and university townships
summary: Veterinary college subsidy scheme, AVGC Content Creator Labs, new National Institute of Design, five University Townships, girls' hostels, and four telescope facilities.

title: Tourism, heritage, and sports
summary: National Institute of Hospitality, guide upskilling, National Destination Digital Knowledge Grid, mountain and turtle trails, Global Big Cat Summit, 15 archaeological sites, and the Khelo India sports mission pathway.

title: Agriculture: fisheries, animal husbandry, high-value crops
summary: Third kartavya opening, fisheries development of 500 reservoirs, animal husbandry credit-linked subsidy, high-value crops including coconut, cashew, cocoa, sandalwood, and Bharat-VISTAAR AI advisory.

title: Women's livelihoods, Divyangjan, mental health, and regional development
summary: Lakhpati Didi follow-on (SHE-Marts), Divyangjan Kaushal and Sahara Yojanas, NIMHANS-2 and Trauma Care Centres, and Purvodaya states with East Coast Industrial Corridor plus North-East Buddhist sites.

title: 16th Finance Commission and fiscal consolidation
summary: Acceptance of the 16th Finance Commission's 41% vertical devolution recommendation, debt-to-GDP trajectory toward 50%, fiscal deficit at 4.3% of GDP in BE 2026-27, and Revised and Budget Estimates.

title: Direct Taxes: new Income Tax Act, ease of living, penalty rationalization
summary: Introduction of the Income Tax Act, 2025 effective 1 April 2026, Direct Tax ease-of-living measures, and rationalisation of penalty and prosecution provisions.

title: Direct Taxes: cooperatives, global business, tax administration
summary: Cooperative sector tax relief, measures to attract global business and investment, tax administration reforms, and other direct tax proposals.

title: Indirect Taxes: review of exemptions and export promotion
summary: Indirect tax framing, review of exemptions and tariff simplification, and promotion of exports of marine, leather, and textile products.

title: Indirect Taxes: energy, critical minerals, aviation, electronics
summary: Customs duty changes covering energy transition, nuclear power, critical minerals, biogas-blended CNG, civil and defence aviation, and electronics.

title: Indirect Taxes: SEZs, customs process, ease of living
summary: Special Economic Zone provisions, ease-of-living and ease-of-doing-business changes in customs, trust-based systems, new export opportunities, and customs process simplification.

title: Annexure to Part A: E3 Standing Committee Terms of Reference
summary: Indicative Terms of Reference for the High-Level Education-to-Employment-and-Enterprise Standing Committee announced in Part A.

title: Annexure to Part B: Direct Tax amendments
summary: Detailed clause-by-clause amendments relating to direct taxes, including rates, exemptions, and procedural changes.

title: Annexure to Part B: Indirect Tax amendments
summary: Detailed amendments relating to indirect taxes, including customs duty changes, tariff schedules, and NCCD revisions.
